scripts.postinstall: npm run build --workspace @portal-corinthians/contracts && npm run prisma:generate --workspace @portal-corinthians/api
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @portal-corinthians/contracts && npm run build --workspace @portal-corinthians/api && npm run build --workspace @portal-corinthians/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace @portal-corinthians/api && npm run lint --workspace @portal-corinthians/web
